flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northwest Vista College rose 52% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.6k → $4.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northwest Vista College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.1k → $10.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northwest Vista College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (12.7k → 14.0k).
